com.newland.nsdk.core.api.internal.setting

Class Settings

  • java.lang.Object
    • com.newland.nsdk.core.api.internal.setting.Settings

  • public class Settings
extends java.lang.Object
    The keys of setting items.

    • Field Summary

      Fields 
      Modifier and Type Field and Description
      static java.lang.String DEFAULT_INPUT_METHOD
      Default input method.
      static java.lang.String LOCKSCREEN_DISABLED
      Whether or not to enable and display Lockscreen settings: `Settings -> Device -> Screen lock` 0: Enable 1: Disable
      static java.lang.String NAVIGATION_BAR_CONFIG
      Sets navigation bar: N910 Pro Value range: 0: (No hidden button) Back key on the left. 1: (No hidden button) Back key on the right. 2: (No hidden button) Back key on the left and show notification panel button. 3: (No hidden button) Back key on the right and show notification panel button on the right. 16: (Show hidden button) Back key on the left. 17: (Show hidden button) Back key on the right. 18: (Show hidden button) Back key on the left and show notification panel button. 19: (Show hidden button) Back key on the right and show notification panel button.
      static java.lang.String PRINTER_GREY_LEVEL
      Deprecated. 
      Replaced by Printer.setGray(int).
      static java.lang.String PRINTER_PAPER_SIZE
      Printer paper size configuration: 2: 2 Inch printing paper, max length of each line is 384px. 3: 3 Inch printing paper, max length of each line is 576px.
      static java.lang.String RELAYOUT_NAVIGATION_BAR
      Sets navigation bar for the following device: N850 A7 CPOS X5 device Value range: 0: Layout back key left. 1: Layout back key right. 2: Hide navigation bar.
      static java.lang.String SCREEN_BRIGHTNESS
      The screen backlight brightness between 0 and 255.
      static java.lang.String SCREEN_OFF_TIMEOUT
      The amount of time in milliseconds before the device goes to sleep or begins to dream after a period of inactivity.
      static java.lang.String SETTING_ACCESSIBILITY_SETTINGS_DISPLAY
      Whether or not to display Accessibility settings: `Settings -> System -> Accessibility` 0: Display 1: Not display
      static java.lang.String SETTING_APK_LOGIN_PASSWORD
      Sets administrator login password.
      static java.lang.String SETTING_APK_NEED_LOGIN
      Whether administrator login is required or not when launching the Settings app.
      static java.lang.String SETTING_APP_DISPLAY
      Whether or not to display App settings: `Settings -> Device -> Apps` 0: Display 1: Not display
      static java.lang.String SETTING_BATTERY_DISPLAY
      Whether or not do display Battery settings: `Settings -> Device -> Battery` 0: Display 1: Not display
      static java.lang.String SETTING_BLUETOOTH_FILE_TRANSFER
      Whether or not to enable bluetooth file transfer.
      static java.lang.String SETTING_DATA_USAGE_DISPLAY
      Whether or not to display Data Usage settings: `Settings -> wireless & networks -> Data Usage` 0: Display 1: Not display
      static java.lang.String SETTING_DEVELOPMENT_SETTINGS_DISPLAY
      Whether or not to display Development settings: `Settings -> System -> Developer options`
      static java.lang.String SETTING_DEVICE_INFO_ITEMS_DISPLAY
      Whether or not to display the following info: Bit 1: 0: Display status info. 1: Not display status info. Bit 2: 0: Display legal info. 1: Not display legal info. Bit 3: 0: Display kernel version. 1: Not display kernel version. Bit 4: 0: Display Bootloader version. 1: Not display Bootloader version. Bit 5: 0: Display Baseband version. 1: Not display Baseband version.
      static java.lang.String SETTING_DISABLE_APP_SWITCH_KEY
      Whether or not to disable App Switch Key.
      static java.lang.String SETTING_DISABLE_HOME_KEY
      Whether or not to disable home key.
      static java.lang.String SETTING_HOME_DISPLAY
      Whether or not to display Home settings: `Settings -> Apps -> Find the launcher app -> Home app`.
      static java.lang.String SETTING_LANGUAGE_USER_DICTIONARY_DISPLAY
      Whether or not to display Personal Dictionary options: `Settings -> System -> Language & input -> Personal dictionary` 0: Display 1: Not display
      static java.lang.String SETTING_LAUNCHER
      Sets Launcher.
      static java.lang.String SETTING_LOCALES
      Sets locales.
      static java.lang.String SETTING_LOCATION_SETTINGS_DISPLAY
      Whether or not to display Location settings: `Settings -> System -> Location` 0: Display 1: Not display
      static java.lang.String SETTING_NOTIFICATION_ITEMS_DISPLAY
      Whether or not to display Notification items settings: `Settings -> Device -> Sound` Bit 1: 0: Display media volume settings. 1: Not display media volume settings. Bit 2: 0: Display ringtone volume settings. 1: Not display ringtone volume settings. Bit 3: 0: Display device ringtone settings. 1: Not display device ringtone settings. Bit 4: 0: Display default notification ringtone settings. 1: Not display default notification ringtone settings. Bit 5(Not supported for overseas devices): 0: Display dial pad sound settings. 1: Not display dial pad sound settings. Bit 6(Not supported for overseas devices): 0: Display screen lock sound settings. 1: Not display screen lock sound settings. Bit 7(Not supported for overseas devices): 0: Display touch sound settings. 1: Not display touch sound settings. Bit 8(Not supported for overseas devices): 0: Display touch vibration settings. 1: Not display touch vibration settings.
      static java.lang.String SETTING_OTA_UPDATE
      Whether or not to display OTA update: `Settings -> System -> About device -> System updates` 0: Display 1: Not display
      static java.lang.String SETTING_PAYMENT_CERT_UPDATE_DISPLAY
      Whether or not to display Payment Certification Update settings: `Settings -> System -> Security -> Update Payment Certificate` 0: Display 1: Not display
      static java.lang.String SETTING_PRINT_SETTINGS_DISPLAY
      Whether or not to display Printing settings: `Settings -> System -> Printing` 0: Display 1: Not display
      static java.lang.String SETTING_PRIVACY_DISPLAY
      Whether or not to display Privacy settings: `Settings -> System -> Backup & reset` 0: Display 1: Not display
      static java.lang.String SETTING_PROCESSOR_DISPLAY
      Whether or not to display Processor info: `Settings -> System -> About device -> Processor info` 0: Display 1: Not display
      static java.lang.String SETTING_PRODUCT_MODEL
      Deprecated. 
      Replaced by DeviceManager.getDeviceInfo().
      static java.lang.String SETTING_PROTECTED_CHARGE_CAPACITY
      Sets charge capacity.
      static java.lang.String SETTING_PROTECTED_CHARGE_ENABLE
      Whether to enable charge protection.
      static java.lang.String SETTING_PROTECTED_RECHARGE_CAPACITY
      Sets recharge capacity.
      static java.lang.String SETTING_SECURITY_SETTINGS_DISPLAY
      Whether or not to display Security settings: `Settings -> System -> Security` 0: Display 1: Not display
      static java.lang.String SETTING_STORAGE_DISPLAY
      Whether or not to display Storage settings: `Settings -> Device -> Storage`.
      static java.lang.String SETTING_VPN_DISPLAY
      Whether or not to display VPN settings: `Settings -> Wireless & networks -> More -> VPN` 0: Display 1: Not display
      static java.lang.String SETTING_WALLPAPER_DISPLAY
      Whether or not to display Wallpaper settings: `Settings -> Device -> Display -> Wallpaper` 0: Display 1: Not display
      static java.lang.String SETTINGS_APP_SIGNATURE_SCHEME
      Sets app signature schemes.Multi schemes separated by "," can be set, e.g., "newland,allinpay".
      static java.lang.String SETTINGS_RECENT_APPS_KEY_CODE
      Sets recent apps key code.
      static java.lang.String STATUS_BAR_ADB_NOTIFY
      Whether or not to show ADB notification on status bar.
      static java.lang.String STATUS_BAR_ENABLED
      Whether or not to enable Status Bar Pull-down.
      static java.lang.String STATUS_BAR_QS_TILE
      Whether or not to display the following settings on status bar.
      static java.lang.String STATUS_BAR_SETTING_ENABLED
      Whether or not to display Settings icon on right top of status bar when it is pulled down.
      static java.lang.String STATUS_BAR_SHOW_BATTERY_PERCENT
      Whether or not to display battery percentage on the status bar.
      static java.lang.String TETHER_DISPLAY
      Whether or not to display Tether settings: `Settings -> Wireless & networks -> More -> Tethering & portable hotspot` 0: Display 1: Not display
      static java.lang.String WIFI_INSTALL_CREDENTIALS_DISPLAY
      Whether or not to display credentials in WIFI advanced settings: `Settings -> Wireless & networks -> WLAN -> Click menu on right top -> Advanced -> Install certificates` 0: Display 1: Not display

    • Field Detail

      • SCREEN_BRIGHTNESS

        public static final java.lang.String SCREEN_BRIGHTNESS
        The screen backlight brightness between 0 and 255.

        Note: The minimum brightness on different devices is unique:

        • N950S: minimum brightness is 6.
        • N950U: minimum brightness is 13.
        See Also:
        Constant Field Values

      • SETTING_STORAGE_DISPLAY

        public static final java.lang.String SETTING_STORAGE_DISPLAY
        Whether or not to display Storage settings: `Settings -> Device -> Storage`.
        • 0: Display
        • 1: Not display
        See Also:
        Constant Field Values

      • SETTING_HOME_DISPLAY

        public static final java.lang.String SETTING_HOME_DISPLAY
        Whether or not to display Home settings: `Settings -> Apps -> Find the launcher app -> Home app`.
        • 0: Display
        • 1: Not display

        Note: this only works when there are multi launcher apps installed.

        See Also:
        Constant Field Values

      • SETTING_APP_DISPLAY

        public static final java.lang.String SETTING_APP_DISPLAY
        Whether or not to display App settings: `Settings -> Device -> Apps`
        • 0: Display
        • 1: Not display
        See Also:
        Constant Field Values

      • SETTING_PRIVACY_DISPLAY

        public static final java.lang.String SETTING_PRIVACY_DISPLAY
        Whether or not to display Privacy settings: `Settings -> System -> Backup & reset`
        • 0: Display
        • 1: Not display
        See Also:
        Constant Field Values

      • STATUS_BAR_SHOW_BATTERY_PERCENT

        public static final java.lang.String STATUS_BAR_SHOW_BATTERY_PERCENT
        Whether or not to display battery percentage on the status bar.
        • 0: Not display
        • 1: Display
        See Also:
        Constant Field Values

        public static final java.lang.String SETTING_DATA_USAGE_DISPLAY

        • 0: Display
        • 1: Not display

      • SETTING_DEVELOPMENT_SETTINGS_DISPLAY

        public static final java.lang.String SETTING_DEVELOPMENT_SETTINGS_DISPLAY
        Whether or not to display Development settings: `Settings -> System -> Developer options`

        This setting is not supported on some devices, e.g., N910Pro.

        • 0: Display
        • 1: Not display
        See Also:
        Constant Field Values

      • SETTING_LOCATION_SETTINGS_DISPLAY

        public static final java.lang.String SETTING_LOCATION_SETTINGS_DISPLAY
        Whether or not to display Location settings: `Settings -> System -> Location`
        • 0: Display
        • 1: Not display
        See Also:
        Constant Field Values

      • SETTING_SECURITY_SETTINGS_DISPLAY

        public static final java.lang.String SETTING_SECURITY_SETTINGS_DISPLAY
        Whether or not to display Security settings: `Settings -> System -> Security`
        • 0: Display
        • 1: Not display
        See Also:
        Constant Field Values

      • SETTING_APK_NEED_LOGIN

        public static final java.lang.String SETTING_APK_NEED_LOGIN
        Whether administrator login is required or not when launching the Settings app.

        Note: Login password can be set by "SETTING_APK_LOGIN_PASSWORD" setting.

        • 0: No need to login
        • 1: Need to login
        See Also:
        Constant Field Values

      • SETTING_APK_LOGIN_PASSWORD

        public static final java.lang.String SETTING_APK_LOGIN_PASSWORD
        Sets administrator login password.
        See Also:
        Constant Field Values

      • SETTING_PRINT_SETTINGS_DISPLAY

        public static final java.lang.String SETTING_PRINT_SETTINGS_DISPLAY
        Whether or not to display Printing settings: `Settings -> System -> Printing`
        • 0: Display
        • 1: Not display
        See Also:
        Constant Field Values

      • RELAYOUT_NAVIGATION_BAR

        public static final java.lang.String RELAYOUT_NAVIGATION_BAR
        Sets navigation bar for the following device:
        • N850 A7
        • CPOS X5 device
          Value range:
        • 0: Layout back key left.
        • 1: Layout back key right.
        • 2: Hide navigation bar.

        Note: Reboot is required after setting.

        See Also:
        Constant Field Values

      • NAVIGATION_BAR_CONFIG

        public static final java.lang.String NAVIGATION_BAR_CONFIG
        Sets navigation bar:
        • N910 Pro
          Value range:
        • 0: (No hidden button) Back key on the left.
        • 1: (No hidden button) Back key on the right.
        • 2: (No hidden button) Back key on the left and show notification panel button.
        • 3: (No hidden button) Back key on the right and show notification panel button on the right.
        • 16: (Show hidden button) Back key on the left.
        • 17: (Show hidden button) Back key on the right.
        • 18: (Show hidden button) Back key on the left and show notification panel button.
        • 19: (Show hidden button) Back key on the right and show notification panel button.
        See Also:
        Constant Field Values

      • SETTING_DISABLE_APP_SWITCH_KEY

        public static final java.lang.String SETTING_DISABLE_APP_SWITCH_KEY
        Whether or not to disable App Switch Key.
        • 0: Enable
        • 1: Disable

        Note: Supported on CPOS, not supported on N910 A7, N850 A7, N700 A7

        See Also:
        Constant Field Values

      • SETTING_VPN_DISPLAY

        public static final java.lang.String SETTING_VPN_DISPLAY
        Whether or not to display VPN settings: `Settings -> Wireless & networks -> More -> VPN`
        • 0: Display
        • 1: Not display
        See Also:
        Constant Field Values

      • LOCKSCREEN_DISABLED

        public static final java.lang.String LOCKSCREEN_DISABLED
        Whether or not to enable and display Lockscreen settings: `Settings -> Device -> Screen lock`
        • 0: Enable
        • 1: Disable

        Constant Field Values

      • STATUS_BAR_ENABLED

        public static final java.lang.String STATUS_BAR_ENABLED
        Whether or not to enable Status Bar Pull-down.
        • 0: Enable
        • 1: Disable
        See Also:
        Constant Field Values

      • STATUS_BAR_QS_TILE

        public static final java.lang.String STATUS_BAR_QS_TILE
        Whether or not to display the following settings on status bar.
        • wifi
        • bt
        • airplane
        • location
        • cell
        • inversion
        • rotation
        • flashlight
        • cast
        • hotspot
        Multi items separated by "," can be set, e.g., "wifi,bt".
        See Also:
        Constant Field Values

      • STATUS_BAR_ADB_NOTIFY

        public static final java.lang.String STATUS_BAR_ADB_NOTIFY
        Whether or not to show ADB notification on status bar.
        • 0: Display
        • 1: Not display
        See Also:
        Constant Field Values

      • SETTING_LANGUAGE_USER_DICTIONARY_DISPLAY

        public static final java.lang.String SETTING_LANGUAGE_USER_DICTIONARY_DISPLAY
        Whether or not to display Personal Dictionary options: `Settings -> System -> Language & input -> Personal dictionary`
        • 0: Display
        • 1: Not display
        See Also:
        Constant Field Values

      • SETTING_NOTIFICATION_ITEMS_DISPLAY

        public static final java.lang.String SETTING_NOTIFICATION_ITEMS_DISPLAY
        Whether or not to display Notification items settings: `Settings -> Device -> Sound`
            Bit 1:
          • 0: Display media volume settings.
          • 1: Not display media volume settings.
            Bit 2:
          • 0: Display ringtone volume settings.
          • 1: Not display ringtone volume settings.
            Bit 3:
          • 0: Display device ringtone settings.
          • 1: Not display device ringtone settings.
            Bit 4:
          • 0: Display default notification ringtone settings.
          • 1: Not display default notification ringtone settings.
            Bit 5(Not supported for overseas devices):
          • 0: Display dial pad sound settings.
          • 1: Not display dial pad sound settings.
            Bit 6(Not supported for overseas devices):
          • 0: Display screen lock sound settings.
          • 1: Not display screen lock sound settings.
            Bit 7(Not supported for overseas devices):
          • 0: Display touch sound settings.
          • 1: Not display touch sound settings.
            Bit 8(Not supported for overseas devices):
          • 0: Display touch vibration settings.
          • 1: Not display touch vibration settings.

        Example: 

             // Media volume settings: Display
     // Ringtone volume settings: Display
     // Device ringtone settings: Display
     // Default notification ringtone settings: Display
     settingsManager.set(Settings.SETTING_NOTIFICATION_ITEMS_DISPLAY, "00000000");
     // Media volume settings: Display
     // Ringtone volume settings: Not display
     // Device ringtone settings: Display
     // Default notification ringtone settings: Display
     settingsManager.set(Settings.SETTING_NOTIFICATION_ITEMS_DISPLAY, "01000000");
     // Media volume settings: Display
     // Ringtone volume settings: Not display
     // Device ringtone settings: Not display
     // Default notification ringtone settings: Display
     settingsManager.set(Settings.SETTING_NOTIFICATION_ITEMS_DISPLAY, "01100000");
     // Media volume settings: Not display
     // Ringtone volume settings: Not display
     // Device ringtone settings: Not display
     // Default notification ringtone settings: Not display
     settingsManager.set(Settings.SETTING_NOTIFICATION_ITEMS_DISPLAY, "11110000");
        See Also:
        Constant Field Values

      • SCREEN_OFF_TIMEOUT

        public static final java.lang.String SCREEN_OFF_TIMEOUT
        The amount of time in milliseconds before the device goes to sleep or begins to dream after a period of inactivity. This value is also known as the user activity timeout period since the screen isn't necessarily turned off when it expires. -1(never sleep) or >0.

        Check the timeout from: `Settings -> Device -> Display -> Sleep`.

        See Also:
        Constant Field Values

      • WIFI_INSTALL_CREDENTIALS_DISPLAY

        public static final java.lang.String WIFI_INSTALL_CREDENTIALS_DISPLAY
        Whether or not to display credentials in WIFI advanced settings: `Settings -> Wireless & networks -> WLAN -> Click menu on right top -> Advanced -> Install certificates`
        • 0: Display
        • 1: Not display
        See Also:
        Constant Field Values

      • SETTING_BLUETOOTH_FILE_TRANSFER

        public static final java.lang.String SETTING_BLUETOOTH_FILE_TRANSFER
        Whether or not to enable bluetooth file transfer.
        • 0: Enable. When file is coming, it will prompt to accept the file.
        • 1: Disable. The prompt will not be showed and file will not be accepted
        See Also:
        Constant Field Values

      • SETTING_LOCALES

        public static final java.lang.String SETTING_LOCALES
        Sets locales. Multi locales separated by "," can be set, e.g., "zh-CN,zh-HK,ja-JP,ko-KR". If it is set successfully, check the result in: `Settings -> System -> Language & input -> Languages`

        Note: "android.permission.CHANGE_CONFIGURATION" is required.

        See Also:
        Constant Field Values

      • SETTING_PROCESSOR_DISPLAY

        public static final java.lang.String SETTING_PROCESSOR_DISPLAY
        Whether or not to display Processor info: `Settings -> System -> About device -> Processor info`
        • 0: Display
        • 1: Not display
        See Also:
        Constant Field Values

      • SETTING_OTA_UPDATE

        public static final java.lang.String SETTING_OTA_UPDATE
        Whether or not to display OTA update: `Settings -> System -> About device -> System updates`
        • 0: Display
        • 1: Not display
        See Also:
        Constant Field Values

      • SETTING_WALLPAPER_DISPLAY

        public static final java.lang.String SETTING_WALLPAPER_DISPLAY
        Whether or not to display Wallpaper settings: `Settings -> Device -> Display -> Wallpaper`
        • 0: Display
        • 1: Not display
        See Also:
        Constant Field Values

      • SETTING_PAYMENT_CERT_UPDATE_DISPLAY

        public static final java.lang.String SETTING_PAYMENT_CERT_UPDATE_DISPLAY
        Whether or not to display Payment Certification Update settings: `Settings -> System -> Security -> Update Payment Certificate`
        • 0: Display
        • 1: Not display
        See Also:
        Constant Field Values

      • SETTINGS_APP_SIGNATURE_SCHEME

        public static final java.lang.String SETTINGS_APP_SIGNATURE_SCHEME
        Sets app signature schemes.Multi schemes separated by "," can be set, e.g., "newland,allinpay". When using "Update Tool" in the device to install app, it will check signature of the app. If it is signed correctly, it will be installed successfully.Otherwise it will fail. Note: The device shall have installed corresponding certificate before installing the app.
        See Also:
        Constant Field Values

      • SETTING_DISABLE_HOME_KEY

        public static final java.lang.String SETTING_DISABLE_HOME_KEY
        Whether or not to disable home key.
        • 0: Enable
        • 1: Disable
        See Also:
        Constant Field Values

      • SETTINGS_RECENT_APPS_KEY_CODE

        public static final java.lang.String SETTINGS_RECENT_APPS_KEY_CODE
        Sets recent apps key code.
        • 82: Menu
        • 187: App Switch
        See Also:
        Constant Field Values

      • STATUS_BAR_SETTING_ENABLED

        public static final java.lang.String STATUS_BAR_SETTING_ENABLED
        Whether or not to display Settings icon on right top of status bar when it is pulled down.
        • 0: Display
        • 1: Not display
        See Also:
        Constant Field Values

      • TETHER_DISPLAY

        public static final java.lang.String TETHER_DISPLAY
        Whether or not to display Tether settings: `Settings -> Wireless & networks -> More -> Tethering & portable hotspot`
        • 0: Display
        • 1: Not display
        See Also:
        Constant Field Values

      • SETTING_DEVICE_INFO_ITEMS_DISPLAY

        public static final java.lang.String SETTING_DEVICE_INFO_ITEMS_DISPLAY
        Whether or not to display the following info:
            Bit 1:
          • 0: Display status info.
          • 1: Not display status info.
            Bit 2:
          • 0: Display legal info.
          • 1: Not display legal info.
            Bit 3:
          • 0: Display kernel version.
          • 1: Not display kernel version.
            Bit 4:
          • 0: Display Bootloader version.
          • 1: Not display Bootloader version.
            Bit 5:
          • 0: Display Baseband version.
          • 1: Not display Baseband version.

        Example: 

             // Status info: Display
     // Legal info: Display
     // Kernel version: Display
     // Bootloader: Display
     // Baseband version: Display
     settingsManager.set(Settings.SETTING_DEVICE_INFO_ITEMS_DISPLAY, "00000");
     // Status info: Display
     // Legal info: Display
     // Kernel version: Not display
     // Bootloader: Display
     // Baseband version: Display
     settingsManager.set(Settings.SETTING_DEVICE_INFO_ITEMS_DISPLAY, "00100");
     // Status info: Not display
     // Legal info: Not display
     // Kernel version: Not display
     // Bootloader: Not display
     // Baseband version: Not display
     settingsManager.set(Settings.SETTING_DEVICE_INFO_ITEMS_DISPLAY, "11111");
        See Also:
        Constant Field Values

      • SETTING_PRODUCT_MODEL

        public static final java.lang.String SETTING_PRODUCT_MODEL
        Deprecated. Replaced by DeviceManager.getDeviceInfo().
        Gets product model.
        See Also:
        Constant Field Values

      • DEFAULT_INPUT_METHOD

        public static final java.lang.String DEFAULT_INPUT_METHOD
        Default input method. After it is set successfully, check it in: `Settings -> System -> Language & input -> Current Keyboard`
        • PinyinIME
        • LatinIME
        See Also:
        Constant Field Values

      • PRINTER_GREY_LEVEL

        public static final java.lang.String PRINTER_GREY_LEVEL
        Deprecated. Replaced by Printer.setGray(int).
        Sets printer grayscale, 1~5.
        See Also:
        Constant Field Values

      • PRINTER_PAPER_SIZE

        public static final java.lang.String PRINTER_PAPER_SIZE
        Printer paper size configuration:
        • 2: 2 Inch printing paper, max length of each line is 384px.
        • 3: 3 Inch printing paper, max length of each line is 576px.

        Note: This is supported on CPOS device.

        See Also:
        Constant Field Values

      • SETTING_PROTECTED_CHARGE_CAPACITY

        public static final java.lang.String SETTING_PROTECTED_CHARGE_CAPACITY
        Sets charge capacity.

        Note: This ranges from 0 to 100.

        See Also:
        Constant Field Values

      • SETTING_PROTECTED_CHARGE_ENABLE

        public static final java.lang.String SETTING_PROTECTED_CHARGE_ENABLE
        Whether to enable charge protection.
        • 0: disabled charge protection.
        • 1: enabled charge protection.
        See Also:
        Constant Field Values

      • SETTING_PROTECTED_RECHARGE_CAPACITY

        public static final java.lang.String SETTING_PROTECTED_RECHARGE_CAPACITY
        Sets recharge capacity.

        Note: This ranges from 0 to 100.

        See Also:
        Constant Field Values

      • SETTING_LAUNCHER

        public static final java.lang.String SETTING_LAUNCHER
        Sets Launcher.

        Note: The Application to be set as default launcher shall declare authorities in AndroidManifest.xml as following:

      • category android:name="android.intent.category.HOME"
      • category android:name="android.intent.category.DEFAULT"
See Also:
Constant Field Values
